name: tempo
description: Tempo MCP and skills for Tempo docs, developer workflows, wallet, and MPP payments.

interface.shortDescription: Tempo MCP, docs, wallet, and MPP payments.
interface.longDescription: Use Tempo MCP from Codex to search Tempo documentation, plus Tempo skills for developer workflows, wallet setup, service discovery, and MPP paid requests.
defaultPrompt: Build a Tempo app that sends stablecoin payments.
Add Tempo Wallet and passkey accounts to this app.
Integrate MPP payments into a Tempo API or agent.
